description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by lush landscaping and mature trees, featuring a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout. The front facade includes a driveway with a parked car, a manicured lawn, and a main entrance accessed by a short staircase. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. The rear and side yards are enclosed by a wooden fence, providing privacy and green space. The exterior is finished in white and natural wood tones, with paved walkways and patio areas visible. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and lush landscaping, featuring a driveway and enclosed yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with a car, manicured lawn, and prominent trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the fenced backyard, dense tree coverage, and minimal window exposure.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the patio area, side entrance, and a mix of large and small windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the backyard, rear facade, and additional green space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
